what: Utility Functions to Work with Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics Municipal Data
title: Utility Functions to Work with Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics Municipal Data
text: il.cbs.muni analyst-oriented utility package working Israeli Central Bureau Statistics (CBS) municipal data. provides tools read CBS data files, handle quirks formats, harmonize IDs across different years, combine data points multiple sources.

title: Utility Functions to Work with Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics Municipal Data
text: can install released version il.cbs.muni CRAN : install development version GitHub :
code: install.packages("il.cbs.muni") # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("matanhakim/il.cbs.muni")

title: Utility Functions to Work with Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics Municipal Data
text: read_cbs_muni() reads CBS municipal data file given year data domain. knows per-year layout quirks - sheet holds domain, rows form (often multi-row) headers, aggregate summary rows CBS added 2022 onwards - every returned row single municipality. Years 2003 2024 supported.
code: library(il.cbs.muni) suppressMessages(library(dplyr))  df_muni <- read_cbs_muni(   system.file("extdata", "p_libud_2021.xlsx", package = "il.cbs.muni"),   year = 2021,   data_domain = "physical" )  df_muni |>   select(1:4) |>   glimpse() #> Rows: 255 #> Columns: 4 #> $ `שם הרשות`            <chr> "אום אל-פחם", "אופקים", "אור יהודה", "אור עקיבא"… #> $ `כללי_סמל הרשות`      <chr> "2710", "0031", "2400", "1020", "2600", "1309", … #> $ כללי_מחוז             <chr> "חיפה", "הדרום", "תל אביב", "חיפה", "הדרום", "המ… #> $ `כללי_מעמד מוניציפלי` <chr> "עירייה", "עירייה", "עירייה", "עירייה", "עירייה"…

title: Utility Functions to Work with Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics Municipal Data
text: read_cbs_index() reads socio-economic peripherality index files. CBS places geographic level different table numbers across editions, default function detects level (municipality, locality statistical area) file content applies matching header layout. already know level, pass unit_type override detection.
code: df_index <- read_cbs_index(   system.file("extdata", "24_22_375t1.xlsx", package = "il.cbs.muni"),   year = 2019,   index_type = "ses",   quiet = TRUE )  attr(df_index, "unit_type") #> [1] "muni"  df_index |>   select(1:4) |>   glimpse() #> Rows: 255 #> Columns: 4 #> $ `מעמד מוניציפלי_MUNICIPAL STATUS` <chr> "68", "99", "99", "99", "69", "0", "… #> $ `סמל יישוב_CODE OF LOCALITY`      <chr> NA, "1192", "1054", "1059", NA, "379… #> $ `שם רשות מקומית`                  <chr> "נווה מדבר", "ערערה-בנגב", "תל שבע",… #> $ מחוז_DISTRICT                     <chr> "6", "6", "6", "6", "6", "7", "6", "…

title: Utility Functions to Work with Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics Municipal Data
text: CBS files use numeric locality ID variable length, il.verse convention 4-character string. pad_yishuv_id() fixes : matters difference 67 0067 stored number, creates clashes cities regional councils working municipal data. example, 31 yishuv ID Ofakim, also municipal ID Nahal Sorek regional council, convention 4-character ID every yishuv. regional councils, modify_muni_id() builds municipal ID municipal status locality ID, rc_code argument switches historical 2-digit code (e.g. 38) 4-digit 5500 + code form (e.g. 5538) CBS introduced 2024 municipal file.
code: df_yishuvim <- read_cbs_yishuv(   system.file("extdata", "bycode2021.xlsx", package = "il.cbs.muni"),   cols = c(1, 2) ) |>   rename(yishuv_name = 1, yishuv_id = 2) |>   mutate(yishuv_id = pad_yishuv_id(yishuv_id))  df_yishuvim #> # A tibble: 1,483 × 2 #>    yishuv_name         yishuv_id #>    <chr>               <chr>     #>  1 אבו ג'ווייעד (שבט)  0967      #>  2 אבו גוש             0472      #>  3 אבו סנאן            0473      #>  4 אבו סריחאן (שבט)    0935      #>  5 אבו עבדון (שבט)     0958      #>  6 אבו עמאר (שבט)      1042      #>  7 אבו עמרה (שבט)      0932      #>  8 אבו קורינאת (יישוב) 1342      #>  9 אבו קורינאת (שבט)   0968      #> 10 אבו רובייעה (שבט)   0966      #> # ℹ 1,473 more rows

title: Clean a string from characters unwanted in (mostly) yishuv names — clean_name
text: Clean string characters unwanted (mostly) yishuv names

title: Clean a string from characters unwanted in (mostly) yishuv names — clean_name
code: clean_name(name)

title: Clean a string from characters unwanted in (mostly) yishuv names — clean_name
text: name character vector

title: Clean a string from characters unwanted in (mostly) yishuv names — clean_name
text: character vector without leading trailing white space, characters letters digits, excluding following: '-()\"

title: Clean a string from characters unwanted in (mostly) yishuv names — clean_name
code: clean_name("test-123_test*456") #> [1] "test-123test456" x <- read_cbs_yishuv(system.file("extdata", "bycode2021.xlsx",  package = "il.cbs.muni"))[[1]][c(153, 342)] x #> [1] "אילון תבור*" "ג'סר א-זרקא" clean_name(x) #> [1] "אילון תבור"  "ג'סר א-זרקא"

what: Combine municipalities data frames from different sheets — combine_cbs_muni
title: Combine municipalities data frames from different sheets — combine_cbs_muni
text: function wrapper around read_cbs_muni() help combining data cities, local councils regional councils. 2015 earlier, Israeli CBS publishes municipal data different sheets formats cities local councils, regional councils. function enables user combine two data frames selected columns. user take care specific match specific columns.

title: Combine municipalities data frames from different sheets — combine_cbs_muni
code: combine_cbs_muni(   path,   year,   cols_city,   cols_rc,   data_domain = c("physical", "budget"),   col_names = NULL,   col_names_from = c("city_lc", "rc") )

title: Combine municipalities data frames from different sheets — combine_cbs_muni
text: path character vector length 1, denoting local file path municipal data file. full list available files CBS relevant CBS page. year numeric vector length 1 denoting year data file pointed path . Currently supporting 2003-2015, since 2003 data structure different, 2015 file already combined. cols_city <tidy-select> Columns keep cities local councils sheet. cols_rc <tidy-select> Columns keep regional councils sheet. order desired columns cols_city, since columns matched order. data_domain character vector length 1, one c("physical", "budget"). Every Excel municipal data file different data domains, notably physical population data, budget data. col_names character vector containing new column names output tibble. NULL tibble uses original column names. Must length number columns picked cols. NULL, overrides choice col_names_from. col_names_from character vector length 1, one c("city_lc", "rc"). Denotes column names kept - cities local councils sheet, regional councils sheet.

title: Combine municipalities data frames from different sheets — combine_cbs_muni
text: tibble municipal data specific year, columns cols_city cols_rc bound rows matched order columns. Every row municipality every column different variable municipality year. advised columns type character, need parse data types . Column names merged relevant headers, single whitespaces kept. Rows 90% empty cells (usually rows non-data notes) removed.

title: Combine municipalities data frames from different sheets — combine_cbs_muni
code: df_1 <- combine_cbs_muni(   system.file("extdata", "2009.xls", package = "il.cbs.muni"),   year = 2009,   cols_city = c(1:7, 11),   cols_rc = c(1:7, 25) )  df_1 |>   dplyr::glimpse() #> Rows: 253 #> Columns: 8 #> $ `שם הרשות`                           <chr> "אום אל-פחם", "אופקים", "אור יהוד… #> $ `סמל הרשות 2009`                     <chr> "2710", "0031", "2400", "1020", "… #> $ `מחוז 2009`                          <chr> "חיפה", "הדרום", "תל אביב", "חיפה… #> $ `מעמד מוניציפלי 2009`                <chr> "עירייה", "עירייה", "עירייה", "עי… #> $ `מרחק מגבול מחוז תל אביב (ק"מ) 2004` <chr> "58.600000000000001", "85.7999999… #> $ `שנת קבלת מעמד מוניציפלי`            <chr> "1984", "1995", "1988", "2001", "… #> $ `מספר חברי מועצה 2008`               <chr> "16", "13", "17", "15", "17", "13… #> $ `סה"כ אוכלוסייה בסוף 2009 (אלפים)`   <chr> "46.100000000000001", "24", "34.3…  # \donttest{ df_2 <- combine_cbs_muni(   system.file("extdata", "2009.xls", package = "il.cbs.muni"),   year = 2009,   cols_city = c(1:12),   cols_rc = c(1:12),   data_domain = "budget",   col_names_from = "rc" )  df_2 |>   dplyr::glimpse() #> Rows: 242 #> Columns: 12 #> $ `שם הרשות`                                                               <chr> … #> $ `סמל הרשות 2009`                                                         <chr> … #> $ `סך כולל הכנסות של הרשות (אלפי ש"ח) 2009`                                <chr> … #> $ `סך כולל הכנסות של הרשות - אחוז שינוי ראלי 2009 לעומת 2008`              <chr> … #> $ `סה"כ הכנסות של הרשות מן התקציב הרגיל (אלפי ש"ח) 2009`                   <chr> … #> $ `סה"כ הכנסות של הרשות מן התקציב הרגיל - אחוז שינוי ראלי 2009 לעומת 2008` <chr> … #> $ `הכנסות של הרשות מחינוך (אלפי ש"ח) 2009`                                 <chr> … #> $ `הכנסות של הרשות מחינוך - אחוז שינוי ראלי 2009 לעומת 2008`               <chr> … #> $ `הכנסות של הרשות מרווחה (אלפי ש"ח) 2009`                                 <chr> … #> $ `הכנסות של הרשות מרווחה - אחוז שינוי ראלי 2009 לעומת 2008`               <chr> … #> $ `הכנסות של הרשות ממפעל המים (אלפי ש"ח) 2009`                             <chr> … #> $ `הכנסות של הרשות ממפעל המים - אחוז שינוי ראלי 2009 לעומת 2008`           <chr> … # }

what: il.cbs.muni: Utility Functions to Work with Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics Municipal Data — il.cbs.muni-package
title: il.cbs.muni: Utility Functions to Work with Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics Municipal Data — il.cbs.muni-package
text: Read harmonize municipal locality data files published Israeli Central Bureau Statistics (CBS). published files change layout, sheet order identifier schemes year year, utilities work around quirks return tidy data consistent identifiers. package also harmonizes several identifier systems used Israeli local authorities brings together data points different years sources, includes readers socio-economic peripherality index publications.

title: il.cbs.muni: Utility Functions to Work with Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics Municipal Data — il.cbs.muni-package
text: Maintainer: Matan Hakim matanhakim@gmail.com (ORCID) [copyright holder]

what: Modify a municipal id depending on the municipal status and yishuv id — modify_muni_id
title: Modify a municipal id depending on the municipal status and yishuv id — modify_muni_id
text: context working cbs municipal yishuvim data, difference treatment yishuv municipality. cases cities local councils yishuv id municipality id . case regional councils, municipality id regional council, every yishuv within municipality different yishuv id. Israeli CBS uses concept "municipal status" differentiate two. municipal status "0" represents city, "99" represents local council. Every 2-digit number municipal id regional council. function modifies municipal status based yishuv_id. returns correct municipal id accounting "0" "99" values.

title: Modify a municipal id depending on the municipal status and yishuv id — modify_muni_id
code: modify_muni_id(muni_id, yishuv_id, rc_code = c("xx", "55xx"))

title: Modify a municipal id depending on the municipal status and yishuv id — modify_muni_id
text: muni_id character numeric vector indicating municipal status, "0" "99" represents city local council, every two-digit number character represents regional council. yishuv_id character numeric vector representing yishuv id. 4 digits long according il.verse conventions. rc_code character vector length 1, one c("xx", "55xx"), choosing regional council code written, xx stands council's 2-digit code. CBS recoded regional councils 2024 municipal file 2-digit code (e.g. "38") 4-digit code formed 5500 + 2-digit code (e.g. "5538"). "xx" (default) returns 2-digit code. matches read_muni_id() CBS data including 2023. "55xx" returns 4-digit code. Use match CBS data 2024 onwards. Cities local councils unaffected; id 4-digit yishuv_id options. "55xx", muni_id expected hold regional council's 2-digit code ("0"/"99" city local council); values outside range recoded 5500 + muni_id without checking.

title: Modify a municipal id depending on the municipal status and yishuv id — modify_muni_id
text: character vector municipal ids: 4-digit yishuv_id cities local councils, regional council code chosen rc_code form (2 digits "xx", 4 digits "55xx").

title: Modify a municipal id depending on the municipal status and yishuv id — modify_muni_id
code: muni_id <- c(0, 99, 38, 69) yishuv_id <- c("0001", "1000", NA, NA) modify_muni_id(muni_id, yishuv_id) # regional councils as 38, 69 #> [1] "0001" "1000" "38"   "69"   modify_muni_id(muni_id, yishuv_id, rc_code = "55xx") # as 5538, 5569 #> [1] "0001" "1000" "5538" "5569"

code: pad_yishuv_id(yishuv_id)

title: Pad a yishuv id to a 4-digit character vector — pad_yishuv_id

what: Read a CBS index data file to a tibble — read_cbs_index
title: Read a CBS index data file to a tibble — read_cbs_index
text: function wrapper around readxl::read_excel(), reading CBS socio-economic peripherality index data file specific year. added value figuring file's structure : default detects geographic level file (municipality, locality statistical area) contents applies matching header layout. full set header parameters available il.cbs.muni:::df_cbs_index_params. function marked experimental CBS index publications stable across editions: geographic level lives different table numbers different years file format alternates xls xlsx. Detecting level file content rather relying table number makes reader robust shuffle - give one file works file .

title: Read a CBS index data file to a tibble — read_cbs_index
code: read_cbs_index(   path,   year,   index_type = c("ses", "peri"),   unit_type = NULL,   cols = NULL,   col_names = NULL,   quiet = FALSE )

title: Read a CBS index data file to a tibble — read_cbs_index
text: path character vector length 1, denoting local file path CBS index data file. full list available files CBS relevant CBS page either Socio-Economic Status (SES) peripheral level. Read single file per call; read several files, iterate (e.g. purrr::map()). year numeric vector length 1 denoting year data file pointed path . aware year question year data , year data published . index_type character vector length 1, one c("ses", "peri"). unit_type NULL (default) character vector length 1, one c("muni", "yishuv", "sa"), denoting geographic level: municipality, locality statistical area. NULL, level detected file content. supplied, given level used -detection skipped, lets override misdetection file whose level already know. cols <tidy-select> Columns keep. default NULL keeps columns. col_names character vector containing new column names output tibble. NULL tibble uses original column names. Must length number columns picked cols. names assigned position, follow data's column order. quiet logical vector length 1. FALSE (default) message reports geographic level used. Set TRUE silence , example iterating many files.

title: Read a CBS index data file to a tibble — read_cbs_index
text: tibble CBS index data specific year, every row single geographic unit (municipality, locality statistical area) every column different variable unit. geographic level used also stored "unit_type" attribute result. advised columns type character, need parse data types . Column names merged relevant headers, single whitespaces kept. Rows 80% empty cells (usually rows non-data notes) removed.

title: Read a CBS index data file to a tibble — read_cbs_index
text: Detection uses raw row count header keyword, separates three levels cleanly files published far. can still wrong file match expected geometry - example table standard index happens municipality-sized, two different tables edition share row-count band. know level, pass explicitly unit_type bypass detection.

title: Read a CBS index data file to a tibble — read_cbs_index
code: read_cbs_index(   path = system.file("extdata", "24_22_375t1.xlsx", package = "il.cbs.muni"),   year = 2019,   index_type = "ses" ) |>   dplyr::glimpse() #> Detected municipality-level ses index file (266 raw rows). #> Rows: 255 #> Columns: 12 #> $ `מעמד מוניציפלי_MUNICIPAL STATUS`                                                <chr> … #> $ `סמל יישוב_CODE OF LOCALITY`                                                     <chr> … #> $ `שם רשות מקומית`                                                                 <chr> … #> $ מחוז_DISTRICT                                                                    <chr> … #> $ `אוכלוסיית המדד 2019[1]_INDEX POPULATION 2019[1]`                                <chr> … #> $ `ערך מדד 2019[2]_INDEX VALUE 2019[2]`                                            <chr> … #> $ `דירוג 2019[3]_RANK 2019[3]`                                                     <chr> … #> $ `אשכול 2019[4]_CLUSTER 2019[4]`                                                  <chr> … #> $ `דירוג 2017[3]_RANK 2017[3]`                                                     <chr> … #> $ `אשכול 2017[4]_CLUSTER 2017[4]`                                                  <chr> … #> $ `הפרש (אשכול 2019 פחות אשכול 2017)_DIFFERENCE (CLUSTER 2019 MINUS CLUSTER 2017)` <chr> … #> $ `NAME OF LOCAL AUTHORITY`                                                        <chr> …

what: Read a municipal data file to a tibble — read_cbs_muni
title: Read a municipal data file to a tibble — read_cbs_muni
text: function wrapper around readxl::read_excel(), reading specific municipal data file specific year specific data domain. added value use row_to_names_fill() pre-defined parameters every year specific quirks Excel headers. advanced users, full set options available il.cbs.muni:::df_cbs_muni_params.

title: Read a municipal data file to a tibble — read_cbs_muni
code: read_cbs_muni(   path,   year,   muni_type = c("all", "city_lc", "rc"),   data_domain = c("physical", "budget", "summary", "labor_force_survey", "social_survey"),   keep_summary_rows = FALSE,   cols = NULL,   col_names = NULL )

title: Read a municipal data file to a tibble — read_cbs_muni
text: path character vector length 1, denoting local file path municipal data file. full list available files CBS relevant CBS page. year numeric vector length 1 denoting year data file pointed path . Currently supporting 2003 later, since 2003 data structure different. muni_type character vector length 1, one c("", "city_lc", "rc"). Since 2016, municipal types bundled together sheets, 2016 different sheets cities local councils ("city_lc") regional councils ("rc"). parameter chooses sheet read. data_domain character vector length 1, one c("physical", "budget", "summary", "labor_force_survey", "social_survey"). Every Excel municipal data file different data domains, notably physical population data, budget data. keep_summary_rows logical vector length 1. 2022 onwards "physical" "budget" sheets open aggregate summary rows (national total one row per municipal status) authority symbol. FALSE (default) rows dropped every returned row single municipality, matching earlier years. Set TRUE keep . effect data domains. cols <tidy-select> Columns keep. default NULL keeps columns. col_names character vector containing new column names output tibble. NULL tibble uses original column names. Must length number columns picked cols. names assigned position, follow data's column order.

title: Read a municipal data file to a tibble — read_cbs_muni
text: tibble municipal data specific year, every row municipality every column different variable municipality year. advised columns type character, need parse data types . Column names merged relevant headers, single whitespaces kept. Rows 90% empty cells (usually rows non-data notes) removed.

title: Read a municipal data file to a tibble — read_cbs_muni
code: df <- read_cbs_muni(   system.file("extdata", "p_libud_2021.xlsx", package = "il.cbs.muni"),   year = 2021,   data_domain = "physical" )  df |>   dplyr::select(1:15) |>   dplyr::glimpse() #> Rows: 255 #> Columns: 15 #> $ `שם הרשות`                                                          <chr> "א… #> $ `כללי_סמל הרשות`                                                    <chr> "2… #> $ כללי_מחוז                                                           <chr> "ח… #> $ `כללי_מעמד מוניציפלי`                                               <chr> "ע… #> $ `כללי_מרחק מגבול מחוז תל אביב (ק"מ)`                                <chr> "6… #> $ `כללי_שנת קבלת מעמד מוניציפלי`                                      <chr> "1… #> $ `כללי_מרחב ימי, רשויות מקומיות הגובלות בחוף הים`                    <chr> "0… #> $ `כללי_מספר חברי מועצה`                                              <chr> "1… #> $ `כללי_סמל ועדת תכנון ובנייה`                                        <chr> "3… #> $ `כללי_שם ועדת תכנון ובנייה`                                         <chr> "ע… #> $ `כללי_שטח (קמ"ר)`                                                   <chr> "2… #> $ `דמוגרפיה_צפיפות אוכלוסייה לקמ''ר ביישובים שמנו 5,000 תושבים ויותר` <chr> "2… #> $ `דמוגרפיה_סה"כ אוכלוסייה בסוף השנה`                                 <chr> "5… #> $ `דמוגרפיה_יהודים ואחרים (אחוזים)`                                   <chr> "-… #> $ `דמוגרפיה_יהודים (אחוזים מתוך יהודים ואחרים)`                       <chr> "-…

title: Read a yishuvim data file to a tibble — read_cbs_yishuv
code: library(dplyr) #>  #> Attaching package: ‘dplyr’ #> The following objects are masked from ‘package:stats’: #>  #>     filter, lag #> The following objects are masked from ‘package:base’: #>  #> what: Read municipalities id's and names — read_muni_id
title: Read municipalities id's and names — read_muni_id
text: Israeli municipalities different id's sometimes even different names across different government organizations. function allows read different municipality id's names , interchanging different specifications easier.

title: Read municipalities id's and names — read_muni_id
code: read_muni_id(id_types = c("muni", "edu", "tax"), include_names = FALSE)

title: Read municipalities id's and names — read_muni_id
text: id_types character vector length 1 3, containing least one (two, ) possible values. id's (possibly names) municipalities kept selected sources: "muni" CBS id's (cleaned) names. "edu" Ministry Education municipal symbol ("Semel Reshut" Hebrew) "tax" Israel Tax Authority municipal id (also known "H.P. number") include_names logical vector length 1, denoting names municipalities (id_types chosen) included. aware municipal names might differ different agencies.

title: Read municipalities id's and names — read_muni_id
text: tibble, every row municipality columns include id's (possibly names) municipalities chosen agencies.

title: Read municipalities id's and names — read_muni_id
text: table fixed reference 257 local authorities, reflecting set authorities current 2024 CBS municipal file. year argument, joining earlier year handful recently created authorities match. Regional councils returned 2-digit CBS code (e.g. "38"). CBS started encoding 4-digit 5500 + code (e.g. "5538") 2024 municipal file; join data, recode regional council ids , example modify_muni_id().

title: Read municipalities id's and names — read_muni_id

what: Elevate rows to be the column names of a data.frame and fill row-wise if needed — row_to_names_fill
title: Elevate rows to be the column names of a data.frame and fill row-wise if needed — row_to_names_fill
text: Casts data rows column names data frame, option fill missing values row-wise. utility helpful case merged cells Microsoft Excel, merged range data first (unmerged) cell. function similar janitor::row_to_names(), exception fill utility.

title: Elevate rows to be the column names of a data.frame and fill row-wise if needed — row_to_names_fill
code: row_to_names_fill(   data,   row_number,   fill_missing = TRUE,   remove_row = TRUE,   remove_rows_above = TRUE,   sep = "_" )

title: Elevate rows to be the column names of a data.frame and fill row-wise if needed — row_to_names_fill
text: data data frame. row_number numeric vector row indices data containing variable names. Allows multiple rows input numeric vector. multiple rows, values column pasted sep argument separator. NAs ignored. fill_missing logical vector length 1 length length(row_number). Every value vector denotes matching row data[row_number, ] row fill missing values (left right). TRUE row, missing values following non-missing value replaced preceding non-missing value. remove_row logical vector length 1, denoting row row_number removed resulting data.frame. remove_rows_above logical vector length 1, denoting rows row_number - , 1:(row_number-1) - removed resulting data.frame, case row_number != 1. sep character vector length 1 separate values case multiple rows input row_number.

title: Elevate rows to be the column names of a data.frame and fill row-wise if needed — row_to_names_fill
text: data frame structure class input data (tibble returns tibble; data.frame returns data.frame), column names derived specified row(s). returned data frame number columns input, rows removed according remove_row remove_rows_above parameters. data types values preserved original data frame.

title: Elevate rows to be the column names of a data.frame and fill row-wise if needed — row_to_names_fill
code: df <- data.frame(   a = 1:6,   b = rep(c("x", NA), 3),   c = letters[1:6] )  df #>   a    b c #> 1 1    x a #> 2 2 <NA> b #> 3 3    x c #> 4 4 <NA> d #> 5 5    x e #> 6 6 <NA> f  row_to_names_fill(df, 2:3) #>   2_3  2_x b_c #> 1   4 <NA>   d #> 2   5    x   e #> 3   6 <NA>   f row_to_names_fill(df, 2:3, sep = ".") #>   2.3  2.x b.c #> 1   4 <NA>   d #> 2   5    x   e #> 3   6 <NA>   f row_to_names_fill(df, 2:4, fill_missing = c(TRUE, FALSE, FALSE)) #>   2_3_4  2_x b_c_d #> 1     5    x     e #> 2     6 <NA>     f

title: il.cbs.muni 0.2.0
text: combine_cbs_muni() now errors cols_city cols_rc select different numbers columns, instead silently misaligning regional-council data two sheets bound together. modify_muni_id() gains rc_code argument chooses regional council code written: "xx" (default) keeps 2-digit code (e.g. 38), matching read_muni_id() CBS data 2023, "55xx" returns 4-digit 5500 + code form (e.g. 5538) used CBS 2024 municipal file. modify_muni_id() longer emits dplyr deprecation warning recycling length-1 input longer one, now also recognises zero-padded city local-council codes "00" "099". read_cbs_index() detects geographic level file (municipality, locality statistical area) content applies matching header layout, longer matters table number CBS used level given edition; level stored "unit_type" attribute result. Pass unit_type explicitly override detection file whose level already know. read_cbs_index() gains quiet argument silence message reports geographic level used. read_cbs_index() longer errors periphery index (year) SES 2013 municipal index; internal fill_missing parameter whose length match header rows made calls fail data read. read_cbs_index() now supports SES 2021 municipal index marked experimental, CBS index publications place geographic level different table numbers across editions alternate xls xlsx. read_cbs_index() now raises informative error lists supported years called unsupported year, index_type unit_type combination. read_cbs_index(), read_cbs_muni(), read_cbs_yishuv() combine_cbs_muni() now error informatively col_names match number selected columns, instead silently padding truncating column names. read_cbs_muni() now supports 2024 physical, budget, labor force survey social survey domains. read_cbs_muni() drops aggregate summary rows (national total per municipal-status subtotals) CBS added physical budget sheets 2022 onwards, every returned row single municipality documented; set new experimental keep_summary_rows = TRUE keep . read_cbs_muni() now raises informative error lists supported years called unsupported year, muni_type data_domain combination. read_muni_id() now returns 257 local authorities, adding local councils צור הדסה שער שומרון (administered parent authorities Ministry Education, education symbol NA). read_cbs_muni(), read_cbs_index() read_cbs_yishuv() now honour full tidy-select grammar cols documented: selecting column (post-cleaning) name, predicate (.character), negative position now works. Column names cleaned selection name copied output round-trips. read_cbs_muni() now raises informative error requested data_domain maps sheet file contain (example file without survey sheets), instead surfacing low-level readxl error. read_muni_id() now errors id_types empty, instead returning tibble columns. modify_muni_id() now returns zero-length result zero-length input, instead fabricating length-1 NA. row_to_names_fill() now rejects NA non-integer values row_number informative error, instead failing internal message.

title: il.cbs.muni 0.1.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-02-12 Initial CRAN submission Functions reading processing Israeli Central Bureau Statistics municipal data pad_yishuv_id(): Pad yishuv (settlement) IDs standard 4-character format clean_name(): Clean standardize municipality names modify_muni_id(): Modify municipal IDs based yishuv IDs combine_cbs_muni(): Combine municipal data multiple years read_cbs_muni(): Read CBS municipal data files read_cbs_yishuv(): Read CBS yishuv data files read_cbs_index(): Read CBS index files read_muni_id(): Read municipal ID mapping data row_to_names_fill(): Convert row column names filling Comprehensive input validation informative error messages Unit tests covering exported functions
